1.content: Choose one to cut your hair
1.title: Who’s cutting your hair?

152.content:
You were 17 years old not too much older than your sister Jillian. Jillian was 16 and she was short with medium length bleach blonde hair. Your parents were away because it was their anniversary and they were going out on a date so you and her were left home alone.

How do you get your haircut?
152.title: Younger

choices: Jillian tilts you back into the sink to wash your hair
Jillian pulls out her scissors and comb
1521.content:
Jillian calls your name and you follow the sound of her voice into the bathroom and find your dad’s office chair in front of the mirror
You enter to investigate and then you hear the door slam behind you

“Hello brother” Jillian says with an evil smile on her face, you run to the door and find to your horror that she locked it

“What do you want Jill?” You ask

Jillian walks up to you and starts to play with your thick four inch long brown hair that covers your ears and is just touching the bottom of your neck

“I brought you in here because you need a haircut” Jillian said as she led you to the chair and sat you down in front of the mirror
“I’ve waited so long to style your hair bro and now I can finally cut that mop” Jillian says as she pulled out the salon kit that she uses to practice on wigs.

As your sister unpacks her tools you attempt to slip away but the door is still locked
“Come on it won’t hurt” Jillian says as she sits you back down in the chair and drapes a long black cape over you, your body is completely covered by the long silk cape leaving only your feet visible.

Jillian begins to comb your hair and examines your face in the mirror as she decides how she is going to cut your hair

Jillian then snaps her fingers as the style comes to mind “say goodbye to your old hair brother” Jillian says as she slowly turns you around in your chair and you get one last look in the mirror before your hair is to be cut off
1521.title: By force

15212.content:
Jillian pulls out her comb and scissors and begins her work on your hair.

“I’m gonna make you so handsome brother” Jillian says as she combs your long hair you begin to fidget under the cape as the comb continues to run through your hair. You are constantly considering running for the door but you always remember that it is locked, you consider leaping from the window but you are on the second story so jumping will only break your leg and Jillian will likely just cut off your hair until the ambulance arrives.

As all your ideas run through your head your sister then holds the scissors in front of your face, she snaps them together and as you hear the dreaded snip snip of her scissors you know that you’re about to kiss your head of thick hair goodbye

Jillian combs up your bangs which are parted to the left side of your forehead and she takes the scissors to your hair

You then hear a (snip snip snip) and watch as brown hair falls onto your lap and you freeze in place as you think to yourself (my haircut has begun) and another few snips are accompanied by more hair falling onto your lap

Jillian hums to herself as she cuts your hair, the scissors continue to slice through your brown locks as they rain onto the floor at your sister’s feet

“So, how has school been for you?” Jillian asks pretending to be an actual hairstylist but you are just too frustrated to talk to her so you just stay silent as Jillian continues to cut your hair

“You know you should be this upset, after all I’m doing you a favor by giving you a haircut” Jillian says as she moves to the side of your head and begins to cut around your ears

You just stay silent and let your sister get it over with

“Okay but when the girls start fighting over you I won’t cut your hair again” Jillian says as she slices off your sideburn

After about a half hour Jillian puts her scissors down and grabs some gel and her comb and begins to style your hair and you just look down too nervous to know what she is doing

“And finished” Jillian says as she begins to slowly turn you around. You stare at the floor that is completely covered by brown hair then your head slowly rises to look at your reflection and you are taken aback by the style your sister gave you

What did Jillian give you
15212.title: Jillian pulls out her scissors and comb

15213.content:
You began to wonder what it was when you heard a click followed by a buzzing sound. “I think you would look better bald big bro.” Jillian says laughing maniacally as the razor gets closer and closer to your head. “Hold on let’s talk about this!” You say trying to get up, but before you can she wraps her arm around your neck holding you in place and takes the first chunk out of your hair. “No going back now.” She says with a smirk.

Jillian starts by going right down the middle and the hair falls onto the floor around your sisters feet and you can also feel your lap get heavier as more and more hair falls onto it. “I’m bored of the clippers.” She says pulling out scissors and cutting off hair at random. “Crazy weather we’ve been having huh?” She says clearly having a blast. “Yeah it seems to be raining hair.” you say sourly.

She finishes your haircut and you look at yourself in the mirror. Your hair was piled up to your sisters ankles. “I think I got some I’m my shoes.” She says taking her shoes off and dumping a clump of hair onto the floor. “Well....what do you think?”
15213.title: Jillian pulls out a razor

choices: The Pet Salon: Special Sports Edition.
154.content: Instead of human characters what if there was an animated anthropomorphic dog that one day goes to a special pet salon whereas they not only have their usual clientele they cater to but also animated anthropomorphic animal professional wrestlers and sumo wrestlers who usually get their haircut and also groomed as well?
154.title: Other

1543.content: Why not someone from school
1543.title: Other.

15432.content:
You are a 17 year old boy with long thick brown hair that falls just below your neck with side swept bangs that almost cover your left eye. You are the only guy in school with hair this long and while some girls love you for it girls like Ally don’t.

Ally is also 17 and in your class, she has long sandy blonde hair that falls to her lower back and she is an aspiring stylist who absolutely hates guys with long hair. Although she hates your hair she has a major crush on you, she thinks you’re wonderful but all you need is a haircut and since you refuse to do it yourself she is going to do it whether you like it or not

She just needs a good place to do it without getting into trouble with the school she decides she needs to trick you

(What’s her plan?)
15432.title: Student

154321.content:
School is out and while most students drive home your car is in the shop so unfortunately you have to take the bus but soon Ally walks up to you

Ally: hey ace (she calls every boy ace) why are you going to the bus?

You: oh my car broke down so I can’t really drive home

Ally: oh I don’t think you want to ride on those loud smelly busses, how bout you let me drive you home

You: I don’t know...

Ally: hey don’t sweat it ace just cmon my car is this way

Ally grabs your shoulders and leads you to her car where she throws you in before you have time to think about it, Ally gets into the driver’s seat

Ally: ok we’re gonna have to make a quick stop before I take you home

You: well Uh-

Ally: ok here we go

Ally begins to drive out of the parking lot and proceeds in the opposite direction of your house all the while you notice a caravan of two other cars following both of them packed with Ally’s friends

Ally: here we are

You look out your window and to your confusion she took you to
154321.title: Trick you into her car

1543212.content:
The car is parked right outside a salon that has recently closed down

You: Ally what are we doing here?

Ally: we’re here because I’m gonna give you A HAIRCUT

(a haircut) those words echo inside your head and as you prepare to try and talk your way out of it the door opens and you are grabbed by Ally’s friends and dragged into the salon

Inside it is still perfectly furnished because the previous owners just bailed on it rather than spend extra money to clean it out but that just means that your haircut can begin all the sooner. The girls try to force you into the chair as you struggle and squirm but eventually one of the girls pulls out several zip ties and straps your arms and legs to the chair, now you’re not going anywhere.

The girls back away as Ally approaches now with an apron around her body and a white salon gown in her hands and she decides to do a little role playing

Ally: good afternoon sir you must be here for your haircut

Ally drapes the gown over your body as it covers you completely leaving no sign that you are restrained, to the outsider you just look like your their on an appointment

Ally: ok so how do you want it done today?

You just remain silent as you look at the small garbage can full of hair right next to the mirror and you stare at it with sadness knowing that your hair was about to join it

Ally: ah you want a special cut, something new? Oh yah this long hair is so dull it’s time for a new look

Ally walks in front of you and grabs some tools to help her with this task

What does she grab?
1543212.title: A salon

15432121.content:
Ally picks up the comb and scissors as she looks at you with a smirk. She turns on her heals and snaps the scissors tauntingly walking toward you. And she begins to comb your bangs

Ally: alright sir are you ready?

Ally then grabs the back of the chair and with one fast motion she spins you around and around in the chair, you get dizzier and dizzier as the girls record on their cellphones all while Ally waits for your chair to stop

As the chair begins to slow down you begin to panic knowing that once this chair stops the haircut will begin, you pray profusely hoping that this chair will never stop but it’s no use, the chair stops and Ally’s friends get excited knowing that they get a front row seat to watch your hair fall to the floor

You feel the comb run through your thick locks torturing you until you finally accept that you are getting a haircut

You: just stop teasing and get it over with Ally!

Ally: oh no ace, Your hair has tormented me for years, I want to saver this moment

After combing for a few more minutes Ally finally holds a thick piece of your hair in the comb and with a loud SNIP SNIP SNIP your haircut begins

A thick lock of hair falls to the floor but Ally decides to pick it up and hold it right in front of your face

Ally: and with that ladies, Mr. Rapunzel has his first REAL haircut

One of Ally’s friends then decides to come forward holding a ziplock bag that reads ((your name’s) first haircut) as Ally puts the piece into it before she returns her attention back to your hair

Ally: don’t worry I’m gonna make you look so handsome

Ally then pecks you on the cheek as she walks behind you taking the next piece into her comb followed by another SNIP SNIP SNIP

SNIP SNIP SNIP is all you hear as your hair falls from your head to the floor all the while Ally’s friends giggle, but for some reason Ally’s fingers feel good against your scalp of course she’s cutting your hair and that frustrates the hell out of you but somehow it’s actually soothing for her to comb your hair, all that sooth is brushed away as Ally moved from the sides of your head to the top, you watch as your bangs leave your line of sight and you look up hoping to catch a glimpse of what she’s doing but then brown hair falls down to your lap.

After what seems like forever of snip after snip and your hair forming a pile on the floor at Ally’s feet she finally puts the scissors down

You: are you finally done?

Ally straightens your head

Ally: I’m done with the cut, now for the style

Ally then squirts a gel like substance on your head and proceeds to run her fingers through the top of your head which is so soothing to you, her nimble fingers and the hair gel sooth your scalp but after a few minutes Ally backs away

Ally: ok, all done doesn’t he look handsome?

Ally’s friends: SO HANDSOME

Ally: ok now should we show him his new look?

Ally’s friends begin chanting spin the chair, spin the chair and with that Ally slowly turns you around and the first thing that catches your eye is the huge pile of hair on the floor but as soon as Ally whips the gown off with flourish and yells

Ally: violas

Your eyes go wide as your hair catches your attention it is now very short with it short on the sides and layered on top and gelled back

Ally: you look so handsome I knew this was the right look for you

Ally’s friends then start whispering to her and Ally immediately turns to you and asks

Ally: so uh (your name) now that your hair is cut would you like to go with me to the homecoming dance this week?

(What do you say?)
15432121.title: A comb and scissors

15433.content: How about in a different time period?
15433.title: Other

info.brief_description: This is a story that will revolve around a character that gets a haircut

Choose your character to play the story as and see where the journey takes you.
